title: Old Shield Animation
description: Reverts 23w40a's changes to the 3rd person shield arm positioning.
body:
# **Old Shield Animation**

This mod reverts the changes made to the 3rd person blocking shield rotation and behavior that was introduced in 23w40a (the first 1.20.3 snapshot).

Below is a showcase of the mod in action (showcasing how the mod's behavior is identical to versions below 23w40a).

![Side by side showcase of the shield animation with and without the mod](https://github.com/sootysplash/old-shield-animation/blob/main/old-shield-animation.gif?raw=true)

## Dependencies

None! Just the fabric loader
